subcodes.first_line: O Thou who gazest towards the [Divine] Countenance and are one mentioned nigh the Divine Throne! Today  the Tongue of the Proof  in the Kingdom of Exposition giveth utterance to this Elevated, Blessed, Word
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه و المذکور لدی العرش امروز لسان برهان در ملکوت بیان
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Greatest Name
